note: Logical coherence of each pair's Task-1 reference alignment before and after the repair procedure (the union-of-removed of ALCOMO, LogMap and AML). 'Unsat' is the number of unsatisfiable named classes in the merged ontology O_src ∪ O_tgt ∪ R; 'incoherence degree' is that count divided by the merged named-class signature. Measured under the ELK reasoner.

footnotes.elk_lower_bound: ELK lower bound (a sound under-approximation; exact HermiT figure pending).
footnotes.snomed_fma_before: The all-equivalence standard SNOMED–FMA merge does not classify under ELK even at a 128 GB heap, so its before-repair figure is unavailable.
